Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

James P. Nevin Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Vlado Maras.
Declaration entered
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Marine Engineering and Supply Company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Economic Damages in the amount of $196,250.00
